creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text: The "10" in that resource setting works because xterm finds (by default) 14 differences in the first 1024 characters.  My trace shows that a couple of those are problems with FreeBSD's tables, and the others are supposed to be reserved (unused), but not handled as such in xterm's built-in tables.  (I made a to-do item to improve that).
